description: Small fragment with numerous notes in Arabic script written in every direction. One is headed by the glyph and is a receipt for Bū l-Faraj b. Bū l-ʿAlāʾ al-Yahūdī [...] al-Mutaṭabbib for a payment for Shaʿbān for the year 53[.] AH. A different note at the top states the year as 527 AH. Needs further examination.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
